Name: curvature_aware_quantization
Title: Curvature-Aware Mixed-Precision Quantization for Deep Learning
Short Hypothesis: A curvature-aware approach can improve the efficiency and accuracy of mixed-precision quantization in deep learning by adaptively selecting the optimal precision for each layer based on its curvature.
Related Work: Recent works like EMQ, SNIP, and AMP-ViT have explored mixed-precision quantization. However, they lack a rigorous, curvature-aware approach. Our proposal integrates curvature analysis with mixed-precision quantization, offering a more principled method.
Abstract: We propose a curvature-aware mixed-precision quantization framework for deep learning. By analyzing layer curvature, our framework assigns optimal precision, minimizing computational overhead while preserving accuracy. We prioritize mathematical transparency, numerical stability, and strict computational bounds.
Experiments: We will test our framework on benchmark datasets using state-of-the-art models, evaluating accuracy, computational overhead, and memory usage. Comparison with existing methods will demonstrate our framework's superiority.
Risk Factors and Limitations: Potential risks include curvature analysis complexity and balancing efficiency with accuracy. Limitations may arise from assuming curvature indicates layer importance and requiring hyperparameter tuning.
